prompt: A clean 2x2 portrait collage of {argument name="subject" default="a young East Asian woman"} in a minimal studio setting with a soft white background, photographed in a high-end beauty editorial style. All four panels are tightly framed close-up or cropped bust portraits with soft diffused lighting, realistic skin texture, crisp pores, subtle natural freckles, glossy eyes, and sharp details around the eyelashes, lips, and hair strands. The overall color palette is pale, airy, and neutral with gentle pink accents, while the subject has straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and wispy bangs in most panels. In the top-left panel, she faces forward with both hands pressed to her cheeks, elbows out of frame, creating a cute symmetrical pose; her face is largely covered by her hands, only the hair, ears, and sides of the face visible. In the top-right panel, show the clearest beauty portrait: direct eye contact, calm slightly melancholic expression, crossed fingers held in front of the lips, long translucent pale pink manicure, and exactly 4 chunky pink plastic flower rings across the fingers, with delicate makeup and softly parted lips. In the bottom-left panel, she leans on a white tabletop with one arm folded forward, wearing exactly 2 pink hair clips on the left side of her hair, casual and youthful styling, relaxed posture. In the bottom-right panel, show a cropped portrait with the hair tied back, one hand supporting the chin, wearing a fluffy off-white sherpa zip jacket over a light pink top, minimal makeup, and a quiet natural expression. Keep the composition editorial and balanced, with each panel separated by thin white gutters, ultra-realistic beauty photography, enhanced image clarity, deblurred details, natural skin, soft shadows, and premium cosmetics campaign quality.
translatedPrompt: 一张简洁的 2x2 人像拼图，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位年轻的东亚女性"}，背景为极简影棚风格的柔和白色，采用高端美妆编辑风格拍摄。四格画面均为紧凑的特写或半身像，光线柔和漫射，呈现真实的皮肤纹理、清晰的毛孔、细腻的自然雀斑、水润的眼眸，以及睫毛、嘴唇和发丝的锐利细节。整体色调淡雅、通透且中性，带有柔和的粉色点缀；主体在多数画面中留着直的 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 发型，并带有轻薄的刘海。左上角画面中，她正对镜头，双手按在脸颊上，手肘位于画框外，形成可爱的对称姿势；面部大部分被双手遮挡，仅露出头发、耳朵和脸部侧面。右上角画面展示最清晰的美妆人像：直视镜头，表情平静略带忧郁，手指交叉置于唇前，留着长款半透明淡粉色美甲，手指上佩戴着 4 枚厚实的粉色塑料花朵戒指，妆容精致，双唇微启。左下角画面中，她单手叠放支撑在白色桌面上，左侧头发上别着 2 个粉色发夹，造型休闲年轻，姿态放松。右下角画面展示一张扎起头发的半身特写，单手托腮，身穿浅粉色内搭和毛茸茸的米白色羊羔绒拉链外套，妆容极简，表情安静自然。构图保持编辑风格且平衡，各画面间由细白边分隔，呈现超写实美妆摄影效果，画质清晰，细节锐利，皮肤质感自然，阴影柔和，具备高端化妆品广告大片的品质。

breakdown.creativeCore: 2x2 美妆人像拼图：此提示词可生成四格影棚美妆拼图，展现了一位妆容自然、风格柔和的年轻女性，非常适合编辑类人像测试或美妆主题的社交媒体视觉内容。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: symmetrical, close-up, 2x2]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
